author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 12 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. 4 BROKEN tests (#1028, #1029, #1040, #1058) strengthened: actual K-FAC off-diagonal walk (#1028), element-wise momentum buffer (#1029), variant inner-value destructure (#1040), case[mean] fixture anchor (#1058). Sabotage demo: muon momentum_buffer[0] += 1.0 caught at line 1688 with original=1 vs round-tripped=2. Follow-up #1087 filed for missing fixture field on multivariate_normal 3d_identity_scale case. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
